messages.subject: Question about the wood burner
messages.preview: Hi Chrissy! Looking at Aug 14-17 for our anniversary in the vintage caravan. Is the wood burner easy to get going? We're glamping novices!
messages.draft:
Hi Sarah · the burner's lovely and simple — kindling, firelighters, and birch logs all waiting by the door, plus a one-page how-to that's never failed a novice. Aug 14-17 in the caravan is currently free · want me to hold those dates 24hrs while you decide?

Chrissy

messages.subject: Dietary requirements
messages.preview: Wife is coeliac. Do you provide breakfast or is there a fridge/cooker? Want to make sure she's safe.
messages.draft:
Hi Marcus · the Hobbit Hut has a private outdoor kitchen (gas hob, BBQ, fridge, sink) so you self-cater — no shared cooking surfaces means coeliac-safe by design. Nearest gluten-free shop is Canterbury (12 min). Happy to pop a list of GF cafés in your welcome folder if it helps.

Chrissy

messages.subject: Sept dates?
messages.preview: Love your page! The bluebell photos last spring sold us. Trying to find a quiet weekend for me and my partner mid-September. What's available?
messages.draft:
Hi Emma · thanks for following us, the bluebells will be back next April · September is still wide open. The Vintage Caravan (couples) has Sep 5-7, 12-14, 19-21 free. Mid-week (Mon-Thu) is £85/night vs £110 weekend. Book direct via wishwood.co.uk/book and the FB-follower code WOOD10 takes 10% off · let me know.

Chrissy

messages.subject: URGENT - locked out
messages.preview: Hi we've just arrived at the yurt but the gate code doesn't work. We're parked at the gate. Please help!
messages.draft:
James — so sorry, hold tight · gate code resets at midnight sometimes after a battery cycle. Try 4720# (with the hash). If that fails I'll be down in 5 min — call/text 07XXX XXXXXX. The yurt key is in the little wooden owl by the door once you're through.

Chrissy

messages.subject: Booking inquiry - Oct half term
messages.preview: Hi, we're a family of 4 with two dogs. Looking at Oct 25-30 (Mon-Sat). The hobbit hut looks magical for the kids. Are dogs welcome and is there a dog washing area?
messages.draft:
Hi David & Helen · yes, two well-behaved dogs welcome (£15/dog flat for the stay) · outdoor warm-water dog rinse by the boiler shed. Hobbit Hut sleeps 3 — for a family of 4 you'd want the Family Yurt (£135 base x 5 nights = £675 + £30 dogs = £705 · long-stay drops to £650 total). Want me to send a quote and provisionally hold the yurt for 48hrs?

Chrissy

messages.subject: Story collab?
messages.preview: Hi! I'm a travel writer (300k followers, mostly UK slow travel + off-grid). Would you ever do a comp'd 2-night stay in exchange for a feature? Happy to share my media kit.
messages.draft:
Hi Kate · thanks for thinking of us · we host 3-4 creator stays a year and 300k UK off-grid sounds right up our line · could you share your media kit and a couple of mid-week date options Sep-Nov? We'd ask for 3 grid posts + story coverage in exchange for 2 nights in the Vintage Caravan or Hobbit Hut.

Chrissy

messages.subject: New 5★ review · Linda C.
messages.preview: Linda C. left a 5★ review: 'The most peaceful weekend we've had in years. The bluebells, the fire pit at night, Chrissy — everything was perfect. We'll be back.'
messages.draft:
Linda · thank you so much · so glad the bluebells were out for you · come back any time, returning guests get the quiet mid-week rate · just drop me a message direct.

Chrissy

messages.subject: Cancellation request
messages.preview: Hi, really sorry but my partner is unwell and we need to cancel Jul 8-10. I know the policy is strict but is there anything you can do?
messages.draft:
Tom · sorry to hear, hope she's better soon. Standard policy is no refund inside 14 days, but as a one-off: if you can give me 48hrs to try to re-let those dates, I'll refund 50% even if I don't fill them, 100% if I do. Sound fair?

Chrissy

messages.subject: New booking · 5 Jul - 12 Jul
messages.preview: The Patel Family · 4 adults + 2 kids · Family Yurt · 7 nights · £1,365 (Pitchup fee £109.20)
messages.draft: (Auto-confirm reply queued · welcome pack will send T-7d · gate code T-1d)

messages.subject: Hot tub?
messages.preview: Hi, are any of your units hot-tubbed? Birthday surprise for my wife and that'd seal it.
messages.draft:
Hi Rob · we're hot-tub-free by design (off-grid, no mains water) · what we do have is a fire pit and outdoor kitchen at every unit, a chiminea, and 16 acres of woodland to wander · happy to suggest a couple of hot-tub-equipped neighbours in Kent if that's a deal-breaker, or talk through what makes our spot different.

Chrissy
